name: odoo-pulse
description: AI business analyst for Odoo ERP (18+) — one-call reports with verdicts, over MCP
long_description: odoo-pulse exposes Odoo's XML-RPC external API as MCP tools and adds composed, opinionated report tools (business_pulse, pipeline_review, receivables_health, inventory_risk, sales_snapshot, absence_overview) that return numbers, highlights, risks, and a verdict (on-track / at-risk / off-track) in a single call. Read-only by default; targets Odoo 18+ (Online, Odoo.sh, on-premise) via the XML-RPC external API — generic tools still run on older versions, but report tools are not guaranteed there.

odoo_url.title: Odoo URL
odoo_url.description: Base URL of the Odoo instance, e.g. https://mycompany.odoo.com

odoo_username.title: Odoo Username
odoo_username.description: Login (email) used to authenticate against Odoo

odoo_api_key.title: Odoo API Key
odoo_api_key.description: API key or password for the Odoo user

odoo_read_only.title: Read-only mode
odoo_read_only.description: Block all writes regardless of tool arguments (recommended default)

odoo_verify_ssl.title: Verify TLS certificate
odoo_verify_ssl.description: Turn off only for on-premise instances using a self-signed or private-CA certificate
